sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Zion innpi nuam sungah, bawlsiatna thuakte le,
Puanpak silh van mite in, phatna la sa khawm
David Tokhom omna ah, gimna tawlna bei hi,
Galzo mite nuamin ah, Nuamna la sa uh hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Amaute in Topa tawh, galdo-in zo uh hi,
A tawntung kikhel lo-in, puanpak a silh uh hi;
lai dahna omlohna, kilemna mun gam nuam,
Paakte a palh zihziahna, nuntakna innpi nuam.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Thupha a dim gam nuam pen, Pasian’ mite omna,
Thupha a dim gam nuam pen, mihingte
Jesuh in hong hehpih a, tua gam nuam hong tun hi,
Kha Siangtho thupha sanna, Pasian tawh
